positive: A symmetrical and aesthetically balanced geometric forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna silhouettes. The foreground composition must include clean, bold shapes suitable for direct apparel printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, and electric cyan, accented by neon lime highlights. Style should blend Art Deco geometry with mystic, minimalist nature themes. The lighting must be dramatic backlighting, emphasizing crisp outlines and strong color separation against a dark background. Composition must be perfect for a centered repeat pattern or single impactful print.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyrighted, messy, low detail, noise, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetry, graffiti
